headline: Georgia PSC approves plan to lower overall rates, deliver annual savings of $50 per year for Georgia Power residential customers
summary: The Georgia Public Service Commission (PSC) today approved a plan to lower overall rates for customers and deliver annual savings of approximately $50 per year, or $4.04 per month, for the typical residential customer using an average of 1,000 kilowatt-hours a month. Total annual savings for all Georgia Power customers will amount to approximately $285 million.

headline: Building A $100,000 All-Weather Dividend Portfolio For May 2026
summary: Screen large-cap dividend stocks using dividend yield + free cash flow yield for stronger income.
